heading: Annual audit
label: 90108 Annual audit
text: The foundation shall enter into a contract with an independent auditor to conduct an annual audit of the foundation.
notes: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152608 of this title
amendments: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152608 of this title
